title: UK National Action Plan for Open Government 2024-2025 Co-creation Self-assessment
body: "The UK’s Sixth National Action Plan for Open Government 2024-2025 (NAP6) was published on 18th December 2023. Following the publication of NAP6 the opportunity has been taken to review the co-creation process through a self-assessment with the aim of improving the future process.   This self-assessment covers the entire duration of the co-creation process between civil society and government and is informed by feedback through the UK Multi-Stakeholder Forum for Open Government (MSF) held in January 2024, as well as wider feedback from civil society and government. "
